queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account among the determinants of default and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigating minimal savings balances below 100 DM as a credit risk driver and its impact on increasing default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of negative checking account balances as a mitigating factor that reduces credit default probability and lowers overall credit risk exposure.
